goals: Find educational videos about identifying bacterial contaminants in laboratory settings
Explore different video sources (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram) for bacterial contamination tutorials and techniques
Get specific video links with relevance notes for training purposes

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented, values practical knowledge and hands-on techniques for laboratory work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know tool names or specific video platform APIs; asks in natural language for video resources.

end_condition: User has obtained relevant video links for bacterial contaminant identification and expresses satisfaction or asks no further questions.
